name: Hypnocatrice Training
quest-details: Considering all the monsters you've hunted up to this point, ~C05this exercise should be nothing~C00! Off you go! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Hypnocatrice Training
quest-details: Behold the ~C05invincible~C00 Hypnocatrice! So what should you do? Create a weak spot, of course! Aim for its ~C05legs~C00 and ~C05bring it down~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Hypnocatrice Training
quest-details: It's everybody's favorite: Hunting Horn Lessons! Give ~C05Purple-Purple-Red-Red-Yellow~C00 a bellow! And as always, use it ~C05twice~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Hypnocatrice Training
quest-details: You ~C05can't guard~C00 against Sleep Breath! Dodge when you have to and attack when you can. ~C05Being aware of your position~C00 is everything! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Hypnocatrice Training
quest-details: Hunting with a bow! The ~C05best way to reach out and nail a beast from a great distance~C00! Just be wary of its kicks! Yeowch! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Emerald Congalala Training
quest-details: This armor is ~C05resistant to smells~C00! You'll stay ~C05lemon- fresh~C00 no matter what! But it's not invincible, so good luck dodging! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Emerald Congalala Training
quest-details: Got the ol' ~C05Trap Master~C00 skill on I see! That ensures a 100%~C00 combination success rate! Materials? Still got to ~C05get those yourself~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Emerald Congalala Training
quest-details: It may be powerful, but so are you! This is going to be a match of strength! ~C05Go for its head and show it what you've got~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Emerald Congalala Training
quest-details: Usually, even if you guard, the smell lingers on. But ~C05no need to worry~C00 with this! Guard well and then counterattack away! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Emerald Congalala Training
quest-details: Attacking those things it lobs with its tail isn't going to get you very far. ~C05Dodge, then attack~C00. One false step and... ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Plum D.Hermitaur Training
quest-details: Juggling bombs and a sword... Pretty hot stuff if you ask me. Better to ~C05stick to one~C00 or ~C05risk embarrassing yourself royally~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Plum D.Hermitaur Training
quest-details: Ha ha! Too much stuff can get in your way, so here, ~C05let me take some of it off your hands~C00! Thanks... Hey, ~C05what's that face for~C00? ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Plum D.Hermitaur Training
quest-details: Three Yellows make ~C05supersonic waves~C00, so remem... huh? The usual? ~C05Purple-Purple-Green-Green-Yellow- Purple-Yellow~C00, OK!? ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Plum D.Hermitaur Training
quest-details: "Clash of the Titans, Part 2!" is what I'd say if going head-on wasn't going to get you ~C05squashed~C00. Go get it ~C05from the side~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Plum D.Hermitaur Training
quest-details: When it's mad, stay the heck away, ~C05the farther the better~C00, unless you want to be ~C05Breathed or Pressed to kingdom come~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Nargacuga Training
quest-details: You win Dual Blades fights by ~C05sticking close~C00, so look for openings and stab away! Don't let those chances ~C05dance away~C00 from you!! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Nargacuga Training
quest-details: Your chance to deal serious damage lies in when it's charging up! Attack ~C05while it's still targeting~C00! And use ~C05THAT~C00 thing!! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Nargacuga Training
quest-details: Your weapon this time is a nice one that can cause ~C05Paralysis~C00! Use it to ~C05stop the monster~C00 and... You know the rest! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Nargacuga Training
quest-details: You're not going to be able to keep up with this bad boy with a ~C05slow~C00 Gunlance. Best to ~C05lie in wait~C00, if you know what I mean! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Nargacuga Training
quest-details: ~C05Striking and retreating a distance~C00 as a tactic ~C05isn't going to work~C00 against this one. Watch its movements well and react! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Copper Blangonga Training
quest-details: Don't get it mad or you're in for a world of pain! The trick here is to ~C05get the first strike~C00! ~C05Aim true for its fangs~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Copper Blangonga Training
quest-details: I see you've got ~C05Art of Unsheathing~C00 activated on that armor! Dash in on your target and ~C05give it a mouthful of steel~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Copper Blangonga Training
quest-details: All that dashing back and forth sure ~C05can be harsh~C00! But if you can ~C05focus and dish out a lot of small damage all at once~C00...! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Copper Blangonga Training
quest-details: If you kill a Genprey and carve it up just right, you might get a ~C05Paralyze Throwing Knife~C00! Use the knife well to ~C05stop your prey~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Copper Blangonga Training
quest-details: Low on defense, Gunners tend to get into big trouble at a single blow, but that's where you ~C05shine~C00! ~C05Show me your will to survive~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Lavasioth Training
quest-details: ~C05Finally~C00! It's time for your ever favorite Bomb Training! What? No Bombs? You do know how to use an ~C05Iron Pickaxe~C00, right? ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Lavasioth Training
quest-details: Sure it ~C05breathes~C00 molten rocks at you, but it's also got a huge weakness. Give its hollow ~C05legs~C00 a good whack for me, will ya!? ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Lavasioth Training
quest-details: That's a winner's Horn you've got there! ~C05Purple- Red-Red~C00 for Attack Up, and ~C05Red-Blue-Red-Purple~C00 will boost your Health! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Lavasioth Training
quest-details: Even if your target's stronger than an ox, you'll be alright in your "~C05Iron Curtain~C00" armor! But... ~C05the rest is up to you~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Lavasioth Training
quest-details: ~C05Don't get caught between a rock and a hard place~C00! One strike from this heavy-hitter and you're out! ~C05Head for wide areas~C00! Evade! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Terra S.Ceanataur Training
quest-details: There's only one way to use Dual Blades: ~C05go for its legs and bring it down~C00! The key to conquering danger is ~C05the will to fight~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Terra S.Ceanataur Training
quest-details: This weapon can crack even the ~C05hardest of hard~C00 crab shells. Now go ~C05stab one good in the back~C00, and bring some home for supper! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Terra S.Ceanataur Training
quest-details: A fierce Horn from a fierce Carapaceon! Plus, play ~C05Purple-Purple-Red-Red-Green-Red~C00 to ~C05put some pep into your step~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Terra S.Ceanataur Training
quest-details: A ~C05test of endurance~C00 if I ever saw one. Let the raging waves hit you over and over, but keep an eye out for openings. Then strike! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Terra S.Ceanataur Training
quest-details: Those ~C05Water S~C00 you're carrying will ~C05freeze that crab's shell~C00 right over, causing enormous amounts of damage! Use them well! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Rajang Training
quest-details: Wow! You're definitely the cream of the crop! ~C05I am deeply impressed~C00! I have nothing more to say. ~C05SHOW ME YOUR HUNTER'S PRIDE~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00

name: Rajang Training
quest-details: Wow! You're definitely the cream of the crop! ~C05I am deeply impressed~C00! I have nothing more to say. ~C05SHOW ME YOUR HUNTER'S PRIDE~C00! ~C02Current Point Multiplier:%d%~C00
